legacy.content:
# Phase 38-01 Plan: Release hardening for pack-driven spaces
## Objective
Ensure release workflows validate pack-driven spaces across engine, docs, and KAPLAY.
## Tasks
1. Add CI check for `spaceVectors` hash parity in bundle artifacts. 2. Add smoke test for runtime overrides (`spaceVectorsUrl`, thematic-basis overlay URL). 3. Add docs-site report smoke to confirm multi-space explorer renders. 4. Add package release notes section for vector/schema changes.
## Verification
- CI artifacts include validated content bundle hashes for `spaceVectors`. - Smoke tests fail fast on missing/invalid runtime vector packs.
